name: Feasibility and tolerability in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis
summary: Abstract-located safety and feasibility outcome for intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin in an IPF randomized pilot.
measurement_method: PubMed abstract-reported adverse events, serious-adverse-event relatedness, scheduled-dose completion, and planned-assessment completion
timepoint: 3-week intervention period and planned pilot assessments

provenance.locator: PubMed PMID 36857968 abstract METHODS, FINDINGS, and INTERPRETATION
provenance.note: PubMed EFetch abstract snapshot reports 1:1 randomization, D+Q dosing, exact dose/assessment completion, non-serious adverse-event totals, sleep disturbance/anxiety participant counts, no serious adverse events related to D+Q, and pilot interpretation.
